data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Spotify leverages a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and maintainability.
data.technical_spec: Utilization of independent and loosely coupled services for each functional component.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Spotify uses a CDN to efficiently deliver music content to users globally.
data.technical_spec: Servers positioned strategically around the globe to reduce latency.

data.title: Event-Driven Architecture
data.description: Spotify employs event-driven patterns to manage asynchronous communication.
data.technical_spec: Events are used to trigger and communicate between services.

data.title: APIs and Protocol Buffers
data.description: Extensive use of APIs and Protocol Buffers for data serialization.
data.technical_spec: APIs facilitate communication and Protocol Buffers optimize data exchange.

data.title: Data Streaming Infrastructure
data.description: Support for real-time data streaming to enable dynamic playlist updates.
data.technical_spec: Implementation using Apache Kafka or similar technology.
